violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025
The dish machine located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2025
The floor in the kitchen area has areas of broken tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026

Meat sauce was observed in a hot hold unit to reheat. Meat sauce, which was previously cooked and cooled, was observed at 74 degrees Fahrenheit for hot holding. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food that is cooked, cooled, and reheated for hot holding must be reheated to 165 degrees Fahrenheit or above for 15 seconds. Food to be reheated for hot holding must be reheated before being placed in a hot hold unit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024

The cutting boards on both prep units are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/06/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets on the 2-door prep unit were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2024
The food service window counter in the front service area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025

The fans in the dishwashing area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024

The floor in the kitchen is in poor repair. Floor tiles throughout the kitchen area were cracked and/or missing pieces. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025
